GET /api/campsites.auth: public — no session required; visibility gate always applied via buildCampSiteWhere (isActive:true, isPublished:true, deletedAt:null)

input.sort: enum: related | price_asc | price_desc | rating — optional; default: related
input.cursor: string (opaque base64url-encoded keyset cursor) — optional; absent = first page

output.items: CampCardPayload[] — serialised: priceLow→number|null, avgRating→number|null, createdAt→ISO string
output.nextCursor: string | null — null when items.length < take (end of result set)

CampCardPayload.avgRating: number | null — Decimal(2,1) maintained by AGG-1; null when reviewCount=0
CampCardPayload.images: { url: string, sortOrder: number }[] — max 5, sorted by sortOrder asc

cursorContract.k: sort key value of the last item: ISO string (related/createdAt) | number|null (priceLow) | number|null (avgRating)
cursorContract.id: CampSite.id of the last item — UUID string tiebreaker
cursorContract.nullK: k = null when the last item has null priceLow (free camp) or null avgRating (unreviewed camp)

keysetWhere.related (createdAt DESC, id DESC): OR: [{ createdAt: { lt: k } }, { createdAt: k, id: { lt: cursorId } }]
keysetWhere.price_asc (priceLow ASC nulls first, id: two cases — k=null: AND[priceLow:null, id:{gt}]; k!=null: AND[priceLow:{not:null}, OR[{priceLow:{gt:k}},{priceLow:k,id:{gt}}]]
keysetWhere.price_desc (priceLow DESC nulls last, id: two cases (mirror of avgRating) — k!=null: OR[{priceLow:{lt:k}},{priceLow:k,id:{lt}},{priceLow:null}]; k=null: AND[priceLow:null, id:{lt}]
keysetWhere.rating (avgRating DESC nulls last, id DE: two cases — k!=null (rated segment): OR[{avgRating:{lt:k}},{avgRating:k,id:{lt}},{avgRating:null}]; k=null (null segment): AND[avgRating:null, id:{lt}]

GET /api/campsites.queryStrategy: single prisma.campSite.findMany — where: AND[buildCampSiteWhere(filters), keysetPredicate], select: campCardSelect, orderBy per sort, take:24. No N+1: campCardSelect caps images at take:5

errors.400: zod validation failed (invalid sort, cursor decode error, malformed filter) — { error: { code: 'VALIDATION_ERROR', message: string } }
errors.404: N/A — returns items:[] nextCursor:null rather than 404
errors.500: internal — generic message, detail logged server-side — { error: { code: 'INTERNAL_ERROR', message: string } }

GET /api/campsites.openTradeoff: OT-1: page size 24 vs 40 — getDefaultCatalog currently take:40; recommend standardising both to take:24 (see tech.md Open Trade-offs)

GET /api/campsites/[id]/availability.auth: public for public campsites (isActive+isPublished+deletedAt:null); authenticated (operator/admin) for non-public — non-public returns 404 to avoid information-disclosure
GET /api/campsites/[id]/availability.cacheDirective: Cache-Control: no-store (explicit header on response) + export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic' on the route module

AvailabilityDay.available: boolean — false when capacity-full OR blocked by host
AvailabilityDay.blockedByHost: boolean — true when a BlockedDate covers this day (NEW CAM-190)
AvailabilityDay.blockedReason: string | null — host-authored reason from BlockedDate.reason (NEW CAM-190)

errors.400: missing or invalid startDate / endDate — { error: string }
errors.404: campsite not found or not visible to the caller — { error: string }
errors.500: internal — generic message only; detail logged server-side

GET /api/campsites/[id]/availability.queryStrategy: 3 queries: prisma.campSite.findUnique (visibility check) + prisma.booking.findMany (range) + prisma.blockedDate.findMany (range, identical predicate to POST /api/bookings CAM-57 lines 93-104). No N+1.
GET /api/campsites/[id]/availability.availabilityMergeRule: available=false when (maxGuestsPerDay && bookedGuests >= maxGuestsPerDay) OR (maxTentsPerDay && bookedTents >= maxTentsPerDay) OR blockedByHost===true
GET /api/campsites/[id]/availability.blockedDatePredicate: campSiteId + deletedAt:null + OR[spotId:null, spotId:spotId(if provided)] + AND[startDate:{lte:endDate}, endDate:{gte:startDate}] — mirrors app/api/bookings/route.ts lines 93-104

GET /api/campgrounds/[id]/availability.note: Structurally identical to GET /api/campsites/[id]/availability above; output key is 'campgroundId' instead of 'campSiteId'
GET /api/campgrounds/[id]/availability.auth: same visibility gate as campsites route

output.availability: AvailabilityDay[] — same shape as campsites route

errors.404: campground not found or not visible

GET /api/campgrounds/[id]/availability.queryStrategy: same as campsites route — 3 queries, no N+1

POST /api/vitals.auth: unauthenticated (public telemetry — browser sendBeacon, no session required)
POST /api/vitals.rateLimit: 200 req / 15 min per IP (in-process, best-effort — lib/rate-limit.ts)

input.name: enum: LCP | INP | CLS | TTFB | FCP
input.value: number (finite, nonnegative) — milliseconds or unitless depending on metric
input.id: string max 64 — web-vitals attribution id (not PII)
input.navigationType: string max 32 optional — navigate | reload | back-forward
input.routeTemplate: string max 200 — path pattern with dynamic segments replaced, e.g. /camps/[slug]. NEVER the raw URL with real IDs.

POST /api/vitals.sideEffect: emits one structured JSON log line per request: { level, event:'cwv_vital', metric, value, rating, routeTemplate, navigationType, deployShA, vitalsId }. No Prisma write. No DB.
POST /api/vitals.pii: none — IP used only as rate-limit key, never logged

errors.400: zod validation failed — { error: { code: 'VALIDATION_ERROR', message: string } }
errors.429: rate limit exceeded — { error: { code: 'RATE_LIMITED', retryAfter: number } }
errors.500: internal — generic message only; detail logged server-side

POST /api/vitals.errorShape: { error: { code: string, message: string } } (standard) | empty for 204
